title: Nebula's Shorter Swords v2
description: Just the right edge for battle!
body:
![all of nebula's shorter swords next to eachother](https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/b/R29vZ2xl/AVvXsEjPdP2hRH4sfJsuvOJxsED-GlyDO2mYwzG3EKci3M-JIYVCqQFEYGIzGzURJAvAS6xuWdRCiXFTQxuZqTCrART5_5UfzI61WkblfMTTT3qb7cAhOZaQWEVOyLw4h2aK_43RMV7pRQBtfymIfbJxmKOr3zQapixcRM1xbMpMWJ5S_Y2rPrf0HP6a3esLVV0x/s16000/Nebula's%20Shorter%20Swords%20v.2%20Image.png)

## Why was it made?
To provide **sleek** and **efficient** swords for a better gameplay experience.

## What does it contain?
Swords of all material types **post 1.16**.
